title: KUKA Innovation Award 2025 -- Winner
description: Our team from KU Leuven won the Medical Robotics Challenge 2.0 at MEDICA for our innovative ultrasound-guided spine surgery robot.

title: Received Best Student Paper Award
description: Won the Best Student Paper Award at the International Conference on Electromechanical Engineering.

title: Presenting at IROS 2024
description: Will be presenting our latest research on autonomous systems at IROS 2024 in Abu Dhabi.
